title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Maersk India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Maersk India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Distribution Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
